prompt: Select the correct tool, material, or replacement approach and explain why the observed choice is wrong.
scenario: You are on a manufacturing or assembly floor running standard work with quality gates. The work under review is Belts, sheaves & couplings, part of the Equipment & Machinery scope. The observed field condition is: belt tension off (deflection measurement - ME). The work is staged — materials, tools, and access are ready, but work has not begun. Reference material on hand: mfr guides.
title: Tool and material selection: Belts, sheaves & couplings (production floor)
